content.eyebrow: Taxi in Gigean · Thau basin & Montpellier
content.accroche: Station & airport transfers, medical transport, sightseeing tours and long-distance trips. Air-conditioned Mercedes saloon and van, a driver who listens — booking 24/7, from Gigean, the Thau basin and towards Montpellier.

content.titre: A taxi service worthy of the name
content.intro: From an airport transfer to a medical appointment, from discovering the region to a long journey: every ride is handled with the same care, in a spotless, air-conditioned vehicle.

items.description: Montpellier-Méditerranée airport, Sète and Montpellier Saint-Roch stations, regional airports. Door-to-door pick-up, schedule tracking, a flat price known in advance.
Seated trips to your consultations, tests and treatments, in Gigean, across the Thau basin and towards Montpellier. Punctuality, discretion and attentive care.
Sète, the Thau basin, Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Pézenas, vineyards: discover the region at your own pace, with a driver who knows it well.
Any destination in France, from Gigean and the Thau basin, in an air-conditioned saloon or van. A clear quote, agreed before departure.

paragraphes: Based in Gigean, at the heart of the Thau basin, Taxi Excellence has been driving you since 2013 with the same standards: punctual service, an immaculate vehicle and a driver who listens. From the everyday ride to the long journey, every trip is handled with care.

Air-conditioned Mercedes saloon and van, serviced and spotless: you travel in comfort, alone, as a family or as a group, with your luggage. Station and airport transfers, medical transport, sightseeing tours, long distance — all your mobility needs, one contact.
Sète, Mèze, Frontignan, Balaruc, Montpellier, Béziers: we know the region and its routes. You book with a single call, and we take care of the rest.

image.alt: Black Mercedes saloon of Taxi Excellence at Place de la Comédie in Montpellier at sunset

items.texte: By phone or WhatsApp, tell us your pick-up, your destination and the time you need. Immediate ride or advance booking.
We confirm the pick-up, the right vehicle and, for transfers, a flat price known in advance — no surprises.
Your driver collects you on time, in a clean, air-conditioned vehicle, and takes you to your destination.

content.titre: From Gigean to the Thau basin, and towards Montpellier
content.intro: Based in Gigean, we cover the whole Thau basin, Montpellier and its metro area, Béziers and western Hérault. Check your town or call us: we look at every trip.

items.question: How do I book a taxi in Gigean?
items.reponse: By phone or WhatsApp on 07 66 90 50 99, 24/7. Immediate ride subject to availability, or advance booking for a set time — an airport transfer, a medical appointment, an excursion.

items.question: Do you handle transfers to airports and stations?
items.reponse: Yes: Montpellier-Méditerranée airport, Sète and Montpellier Saint-Roch stations, as well as the region's airports. The transfer price is agreed in advance as a flat rate, whatever the traffic.

items.question: Do you provide medical transport?
items.reponse: Yes, we provide seated transport to your consultations, tests and treatments, in Gigean, across the Thau basin and towards Montpellier. Contact us to arrange your trips, one-off or regular.

items.question: How far do you travel?
items.reponse: From Gigean, we cover the whole Thau basin (Sète, Mèze, Frontignan, Balaruc…), Montpellier and its metro area, Béziers and western Hérault. For long distance, we go anywhere in France, on quote.

items.question: Do you carry groups or luggage?
items.reponse: Yes. We have an air-conditioned Mercedes van for groups, families and airport transfers with luggage, alongside the saloon. Please state the number of passengers when booking.

items.texte: Un service irréprochable à tous les niveaux que ce soit la ponctualité, la disponibilité et la sympathie du chauffeur. Je suis passée 2 fois par cette compagnie pour me rendre à des examens et je repasserai par leurs services sans hésiter !

Un service de qualité remarquable : un message la veille et le jour J pour me rassurer sur le fait que mon taxi serait bien là pour que je puisse prendre mon avion, un timing exemplaire, et pour finir il m'a été proposé de rester avec moi pour que je n'aie pas à attendre seule dans la nuit. Je recommande les yeux fermés.

Super service et ponctualité de la part du chauffeur que j'ai prévenu un mois à l'avance pour mon déplacement avec mon berger allemand. Encore un grand merci pour le stress évité, pour votre sympathie et votre professionnalisme ! À très bientôt :)

Ce matin, alors que la personne qui devait m'accompagner à la gare m'a fait faux bond, ma fille qui n'est pas sur Montpellier a appelé cette compagnie. Le taxi avec son chauffeur Robert m'a accompagnée en deux temps trois mouvements à la gare. Il a rappelé ma fille à trois reprises pour l'informer de la situation. En même temps il a vérifié le numéro de mon train et m'a donné le quai où je devais me rendre. Efficacité, sympathique et rassurant. Je recommande cette compagnie. Merci beaucoup.

content.disclaimer: Published on our Google listing and reproduced here in French, exactly as our passengers wrote them.

image.alt: Black Mercedes saloon of Taxi Excellence in profile with a TAXI sign, in the city

content.sousTitre: Immediate ride or advance booking: your Taxi Excellence driver answers 24/7.

meta.title: Taxi services in Gigean — transfers & tours
meta.description: Flat-rate station and airport transfers, seated medical transport, sightseeing tours and long-distance trips: our services in Gigean and the Thau basin.

content.titre: One address for all your journeys
content.intro: From Gigean to the Thau basin, and far beyond: Taxi Excellence covers all your mobility needs. Each service has its own page.
Click a service for the detail: what it covers, how it works and frequently asked questions.

items.description: Montpellier-Méditerranée, Sète and Montpellier Saint-Roch stations, regional airports. Door-to-door pick-up, schedule tracking, flat rate.
Seated trips to your consultations, tests and treatments, with punctuality, discretion and care.
Discover the region at your own pace: Thau basin, Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Pézenas, vineyards and coast.
Any destination in France, in an air-conditioned saloon or van, with a clear quote agreed before departure.

paragraphes: For station and airport transfers, everything starts from your schedule: we track your flight or train, pick you up in Gigean, the Thau basin or the address of your choice, and drop you off as close as possible to the terminal or platform. The flat rate is announced when you book — the agreed amount is what you pay, whatever the traffic.

Seated medical transport calls for punctuality and calm: we build in the margin needed for your consultations, tests and treatments towards Montpellier, Sète or Béziers, and can schedule regular trips for an ongoing treatment.
Sightseeing tours are planned with you: Sète and Mont Saint-Clair, the oyster beds of Bouzigues and Mèze, Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert or Pézenas, for a half-day or a full day, with the stops you want.

Long distance, finally, covers any destination in France, in a saloon or a seven-seat van: departure from your door, a quote set before leaving, a calm drive all the way. Local rides, for their part, follow the metered official taxi tariff.

content.sousTitre: Describe your trip by phone or WhatsApp: we confirm the time and the vehicle, day or night.

service.name: Station & airport transfers

content.titre: Never miss your flight or your train
content.intro: Pick-up in Gigean, the Thau basin or the address of your choice, and drop-off right at the terminal or platform — with tracking of your schedule.

paragraphes: Taxi Excellence handles your links to Montpellier-Méditerranée airport, Sète station and Montpellier Saint-Roch station, as well as the region's airports and stations. We pick you up in Gigean, the Thau basin or the address of your choice, and drop you off as close as possible to the terminal or platform.

The transfer price is agreed in advance as a flat rate: you know the price before you get in, whatever the traffic. We track your flight and train times and adjust the pick-up in case of delay or early arrival.
For families, groups and heavy luggage, an air-conditioned Mercedes van is available on request.

items.description: Direct transfer from Gigean, the Thau basin and western Hérault, timed to your flight.
Drop-off and pick-up as close as possible to the platforms, luggage included.
Links to the nearby major transport hubs, by reservation.
A price known before departure and a pick-up adjusted to flight or train delays.

items.texte: Flight or train number, time, pick-up address and number of passengers.

items.question: What happens if my flight is delayed?
items.reponse: We track flight times: in case of delay or early arrival, we adjust the pick-up time, with no extra charge for the shift.

items.question: Is the price fixed in advance?
items.reponse: Yes. Station and airport transfers are charged at a flat rate, agreed before departure: you know the price whatever the traffic.

items.question: Do you pick me up at home?
items.reponse: Yes, we pick up in Gigean, across the whole Thau basin and at the address of your choice, day or night.

service.name: Medical transport

content.titre: Your health trips, with peace of mind
content.intro: Consultation, test, treatment, admission or discharge: we take you there on time, with care and discretion, in Gigean, the Thau basin and towards Montpellier.

content.titre: Health transport that is human and punctual
paragraphes: Taxi Excellence provides seated transport for patients to their medical appointments: consultations, tests, treatment sessions, admissions and discharges. We operate in Gigean, across the whole Thau basin and towards the healthcare hubs of Montpellier, Sète and Béziers.

Punctuality is essential for a medical appointment: we plan for the time, the traffic and the parking so that you arrive calmly, without rushing. Care is provided with respect, patience and discretion.
One-off trip or regular journeys: contact us to arrange your medical rides in advance and travel with peace of mind.

items.texte: Tell us the address, the facility, the appointment time and any particular needs.
We agree on the pick-up time, with the margin needed to arrive relaxed.
Your driver takes you there and, if needed, brings you back home.

items.question: Where do you provide medical transport?
items.reponse: From Gigean and the whole Thau basin (Sète, Mèze, Frontignan, Balaruc…), to the healthcare hubs of Montpellier, Sète and Béziers, as well as the region's practices and laboratories.

items.question: Can I book regular trips?
items.reponse: Yes. For a treatment or follow-up that requires repeated trips, we plan your rides in advance to guarantee availability and timing.

items.question: How do I book medical transport?
items.reponse: Call or message us with the facility, the address and the appointment time: we arrange the pick-up, one-off or regular.

content.sousTitre: Call us: we arrange a punctual and attentive trip.

meta.title: Sightseeing taxi tours — Sète, Saint-Guilhem
meta.description: Taxi excursions from Gigean: Sète and the Thau basin, Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Pézenas, vineyards. An itinerary planned with you, at your own pace.

service.name: Sightseeing tours
service.description: Excursions and sightseeing tours by taxi from Gigean and the Thau basin, discovering the Hérault.

content.intro: For a half-day or a full day, let yourself be guided through the Thau basin, the hinterland and the vineyards — comfortably seated, with no driving or parking to worry about.

content.titre: The region, the way a local would show it
paragraphes: Between lagoons, garrigue and vineyards, the Hérault is far better discovered without worrying about the road. Taxi Excellence takes you for a day or a half-day to the region's finest spots, at your own pace, with the stops you want.
You choose the destination and the mood — heritage, nature, tasting, coast — and we plan the itinerary. Pick-up at your hotel, your rental or your home, in an air-conditioned saloon or van.
Ideal for a stay, a family visit, a group of friends or hosting your guests: tell us what you'd like and we'll build the tour.

image.alt: Black Mercedes saloon of Taxi Excellence in profile, ready for an excursion

content.intro: As many starting points as there are wishes — here are a few popular itineraries, to tailor to your day.

items.description: The port of Sète, Mont Saint-Clair, the oyster beds of Bouzigues and Mèze, a tasting by the water.
One of France's most beautiful villages, the Devil's Bridge and the Clamouse cave.
Lanes, mansions and craft artisans in the town of Molière and its surroundings.
Wine estates, tastings and Hérault beaches, between Marseillan, Agde and the Mediterranean.

items.question: Can I customise my tour?
items.reponse: Of course. Tell us what you enjoy — heritage, nature, tasting, coast — and we'll plan the itinerary, the stops and the duration to match your wishes.

items.question: How many people can come along?
items.reponse: From one to seven people depending on the vehicle. The air-conditioned Mercedes van is ideal for families and small groups.

items.question: How is a tour priced?
items.reponse: On quote, based on the duration, the itinerary and the number of passengers. The price is agreed in advance, with no surprises.

content.sousTitre: Tell us your wishes: we'll plan your tailor-made tour.

meta.title: Taxi fares — flat rates from Gigean & Montpellier
meta.description: Day and night taxi flat rates from Montpellier Saint-Roch station, quotes from Gigean and the Thau basin. Distances, travel times and a fare simulator.

service.name: Fare grid
service.description: Indicative fare grid: day and night flat rates from Montpellier Saint-Roch station, quotes from Gigean and the Thau basin.

content.titre: Estimate the price of your trips
content.intro: Our base is in Gigean, at the heart of the Thau basin: local rides there follow the metered official taxi tariff, and every trip from Gigean or nearby is priced on quote. The grid below shows, as a reference, our flat rates from Montpellier Saint-Roch station.

content.argumentaireTitre: Estimate the price of your ride
content.argumentaire: Enter the approximate distance of your trip and choose the day or night rate. You get an instant estimate. For a firm price, ask us for a quote — it is confirmed before every departure.
points: Day and night rates, Sundays & public holidays
A firm flat rate confirmed before departure
content.cardIntro: Indicative estimate, excluding traffic and waiting time.
content.note: * Indicative estimate based on the distance and the chosen options, subject to change depending on traffic, the actual route, waiting time and the number of passengers. Local rides (Gigean and the Thau basin) follow the metered official taxi tariff. A firm flat rate is confirmed before each departure.

content.intro: Indicative flat rates for the main destinations, with estimated distance and travel time. For a departure from Gigean, the Thau basin or any other address, request your quote.
content.note: * Indicative rates from Montpellier Saint-Roch station, subject to change depending on traffic, luggage, waiting time and the number of passengers. Local rides (Gigean and the Thau basin) follow the metered official taxi tariff. A firm flat rate is confirmed before each departure.

items.question: How is the price of a ride set?
items.reponse: Local rides, in Gigean and the Thau basin, follow the metered official taxi tariff. For longer trips — transfers, long distance — a firm flat rate is agreed and confirmed before departure: the amount announced is what you pay.

items.question: When does the night rate apply?
items.reponse: From 7pm to 7am, as well as on Sundays and public holidays. On weekdays from 7am to 7pm, the day rate applies — the two columns of the grid match these time slots.

items.question: Do the listed flat rates apply from Gigean?
items.reponse: The grid is set from Montpellier Saint-Roch station, as a reference. For a departure from Gigean, the Thau basin or any other address, we price your trip on quote, with a flat rate confirmed before departure.

items.question: Can the amount change along the way?
items.reponse: Not for a flat rate: the price confirmed before departure is final. The grid's rates, however, remain indicative and may vary with luggage, waiting time and the number of passengers — which is why a quote is worth asking for.

content.sousTitre: Tell us your pick-up and your destination: we confirm a firm flat rate before departure, 24/7.

meta.title: About — your taxi in Gigean since 2013
meta.description: Taxi driver in Gigean since 2013: reliable punctuality, clean air-conditioned Mercedes vehicles, smooth driving and deep knowledge of the Thau basin.

content.titre: A trusted taxi, rooted in its region
content.intro: Since 2013, Taxi Excellence has driven the residents and visitors of the Thau basin with the same commitment to service.

paragraphes: Taxi Excellence was born in Gigean from a simple idea: to offer a taxi you can rely on, at any hour. Since 2013, we have driven the residents of the Thau basin and their visitors, for the everyday ride as well as the big occasions.

What sets us apart is attentiveness: a clean, air-conditioned Mercedes, kept punctuality, smooth driving and a driver who listens. Whether you're off to the airport, a medical appointment or an excursion, you're in good hands.
Rooted in the region, we know its roads, its timetables and its shortcuts. It's this local knowledge, put at each client's service, that makes the difference.

image.alt: Black Mercedes saloon of Taxi Excellence in Montpellier at sunset

items.description: We plan for the time, the traffic and the parking so we're there on time, every time.
An air-conditioned Mercedes saloon and van, serviced and spotless, for every trip.
An attentive, patient driver who respects your peace and quiet.
A flat rate known in advance on transfers, a clear quote on long distance and tours.

content.sousTitre: Book your ride in Gigean and the Thau basin, 24/7.
